idea.title: Solar Storm Scorcher
idea.thesis: Spikes in solar activity and geomagnetic storms can disrupt satellite operations, power grids, and other critical infrastructure, signaling potential volatility in energy and technology sectors. Solar storms can impact energy infrastructure and space-based technologies, which are crucial for the energy and technology sectors.
data_sources: NOAA daily solar activity index through weather_series adapter
idea.signal_logic: If the daily solar activity index increases by more than 50% compared to the prior 7-day average
idea.entry_exit: Entry: If the daily solar activity index increases by more than 50% compared to the prior 7-day average Exit: After 3 trading days or once the index retreats by 30%
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use NOAA daily solar activity index through weather_series adapter via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Solar activity can exhibit periodic spikes and storms, which are more likely to occur within a 30-day timeframe, especially during active phases of the solar cycle.

data.source: NOAA daily solar activity index through weather_series adapter

schema.behavior: Spikes in solar activity and geomagnetic storms can disrupt satellite operations, power grids, and other critical infrastructure, signaling potential volatility in energy and technology sectors.

market_impact.rationale: Solar storms can impact energy infrastructure and space-based technologies, which are crucial for the energy and technology sectors.

trade_logic.entry: If the daily solar activity index increases by more than 50% compared to the prior 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 3 trading days or once the index retreats by 30%

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Solar activity can exhibit periodic spikes and storms, which are more likely to occur within a 30-day timeframe, especially during active phases of the solar cycle.

idea.title: Ev Charging Station Stampede
idea.thesis: Rapid growth in the number of public EV charging stations can signal increasing consumer adoption of electric vehicles and related infrastructure investment. EV adoption and charging infrastructure growth are closely tied to consumer discretionary spending and the future of transportation.
data_sources: Openchargemap public EV charging station data through openchargemap adapter
idea.signal_logic: If the weekly growth rate in public EV charging stations exceeds 2%
idea.entry_exit: Entry: If the weekly growth rate in public EV charging stations exceeds 2% Exit: After 2 weeks or once the growth rate falls below 1%
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Openchargemap public EV charging station data through openchargemap adapter via api (weekly).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Adoption of electric vehicles and expansion of charging infrastructure is a long-term trend, but can exhibit periods of accelerated growth that may occur within a 30-day timeframe.

data.source: Openchargemap public EV charging station data through openchargemap adapter

schema.behavior: Rapid growth in the number of public EV charging stations can signal increasing consumer adoption of electric vehicles and related infrastructure investment.

market_impact.rationale: EV adoption and charging infrastructure growth are closely tied to consumer discretionary spending and the future of transportation.

trade_logic.entry: If the weekly growth rate in public EV charging stations exceeds 2%
trade_logic.exit: After 2 weeks or once the growth rate falls below 1%

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Adoption of electric vehicles and expansion of charging infrastructure is a long-term trend, but can exhibit periods of accelerated growth that may occur within a 30-day timeframe.

idea.title: Earthquake Aftershock Amplifier
idea.thesis: Significant earthquake events can trigger increased aftershock activity, which may signal volatility and uncertainty in energy and industrial sectors. Earthquakes can disrupt energy infrastructure, supply chains, and construction activity.
data_sources: USGS earthquake activity through earthquake_activity adapter
idea.signal_logic: If the daily earthquake activity index increases by more than 50% compared to the prior 7-day average
idea.entry_exit: Entry: If the daily earthquake activity index increases by more than 50% compared to the prior 7-day average Exit: After 5 trading days or once the index retreats by 30%
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use USGS earthquake activity through earthquake_activity adapter via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake clusters and aftershock sequences are common, and can often be observed within a 30-day timeframe, especially in seismically active regions.

trade_logic.exit: After 5 trading days or once the index retreats by 30%

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake clusters and aftershock sequences are common, and can often be observed within a 30-day timeframe, especially in seismically active regions.

idea.title: Crypto Capitulation Countdown
idea.thesis: Cryptocurrency prices often experience sharp sell-offs in times of market stress, signaling a broader retreat from risk assets. Cryptocurrencies are a high-risk, high-volatility asset class that is tightly correlated with technology and consumer discretionary stocks.
data_sources: Yahoo Finance daily prices for BTC-USD and SPY through price_only adapter
idea.signal_logic: If BTC-USD closes down more than 5% for 3 consecutive days
idea.entry_exit: Entry: If BTC-USD closes down more than 5% for 3 consecutive days Exit: After 7 trading days or once BTC-USD outperforms SPY by 2%
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Yahoo Finance daily prices for BTC-USD and SPY through price_only adapter via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Cryptocurrency markets are known for their volatility, and sharp selloffs often occur in times of broader market stress or uncertainty.

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily prices for BTC-USD and SPY through price_only adapter

schema.behavior: Cryptocurrency prices often experience sharp sell-offs in times of market stress, signaling a broader retreat from risk assets.

market_impact.rationale: Cryptocurrencies are a high-risk, high-volatility asset class that is tightly correlated with technology and consumer discretionary stocks.

trade_logic.entry: If BTC-USD closes down more than 5% for 3 consecutive days
trade_logic.exit: After 7 trading days or once BTC-USD outperforms SPY by 2%

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Cryptocurrency markets are known for their volatility, and sharp selloffs often occur in times of broader market stress or uncertainty.

idea.title: Industrial Sector Weekly Earthquake Activity Correlation Dip
idea.thesis: A sudden 40%+ weekly drop in earthquake activity near industrial regions correlates with short-term industrial sector strength due to fewer disruption risks. Lower seismic disturbances reduce operational risks for industrial companies.
data_sources: USGS earthquake_activity weekly counts near major industrial hubs
idea.signal_logic: Enter long XLI if weekly earthquake counts drop more than 40% vs prior week
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter long XLI if weekly earthquake counts drop more than 40% vs prior week Exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if XLI drops 4%
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use USGS earthquake_activity weekly counts near major industrial hubs via api (weekly).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake activity fluctuates regularly enough to trigger dips and recoveries on a weekly basis.

schema.idea: Industrial sector weekly earthquake activity correlation dip

data.source: USGS earthquake_activity weekly counts near major industrial hubs

schema.behavior: A sudden 40%+ weekly drop in earthquake activity near industrial regions correlates with short-term industrial sector strength due to fewer disruption risks.

market_impact.rationale: Lower seismic disturbances reduce operational risks for industrial companies.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLI if weekly earthquake counts drop more than 40% vs prior week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if XLI drops 4%

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake activity fluctuates regularly enough to trigger dips and recoveries on a weekly basis.

idea.title: Energy Sector Weekly Drawdown Exhaustion
idea.thesis: After a 3-week consecutive decline totaling more than 8%, a reversal week with a smaller loss or gain often signals short-term bottoming. Energy sector tends to mean revert after sharp multi-week declines.
data_sources: Yahoo Finance weekly prices for XLE
idea.signal_logic: Enter long if XLE drops 3 consecutive weeks totaling >8% and then weekly loss is <2% or positive
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter long if XLE drops 3 consecutive weeks totaling >8% and then weekly loss is <2% or positive Exit: Exit after 4 weeks or a 5% gain is realized
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Yahoo Finance weekly prices for XLE via api (weekly).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Energy volatility and drawdowns are common, creating regular opportunities for this pattern.

data.source: Yahoo Finance weekly prices for XLE

schema.behavior: After a 3-week consecutive decline totaling more than 8%, a reversal week with a smaller loss or gain often signals short-term bottoming.

market_impact.rationale: Energy sector tends to mean revert after sharp multi-week declines.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long if XLE drops 3 consecutive weeks totaling >8% and then weekly loss is <2% or positive
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or a 5% gain is realized

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Energy volatility and drawdowns are common, creating regular opportunities for this pattern.

idea.title: Utilities Sector Negative Price Gap Fill
idea.thesis: A gap down of more than 1.5% that fills (closes back above previous day's close) within 3 days often leads to short-term rallies. Gap fills signal short-term demand overcoming initial sell pressure in utilities.
data_sources: Yahoo Finance daily prices for XLU
idea.signal_logic: Enter long XLU when a gap down >1.5% on day 1 is filled by close within 3 days
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter long XLU when a gap down >1.5% on day 1 is filled by close within 3 days Exit: Exit after 5 trading days or if XLU drops 2% from entry
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Yahoo Finance daily prices for XLU via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Gap down and fill patterns happen frequently in utilities due to sector defensiveness.

idea.title: Materials Sector Weekly Positive Correlation Breakdown With Xlb
idea.thesis: When XLB weekly returns decouple negatively from SPY returns for 2 consecutive weeks, a rebound in XLB often follows. Short-term negative divergence from broad market is often overdone in materials.

idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter long XLB if weekly returns are negative while SPY returns are positive for 2 weeks in a row Exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if XLB gains 6%
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.

idea.implementation_notes: Use Yahoo Finance weekly returns for XLB and SPY via api (weekly).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Materials sector often exhibits short-term divergences from SPY.

idea.implementation_notes: Use Yahoo Finance daily returns for XLF and SPY via api (daily).

idea.title: Staples Sector Drawdown Rapid Recovery
idea.thesis: When XLP falls 3%+ in 3 days but bounces back 1%+ on the 4th day, it often signals short-term oversold relief. Consumer staples often see quick mean reversion after sharp short-term selloffs.
data_sources: Yahoo Finance daily prices for XLP
idea.signal_logic: Enter long XLP on day 4 if prior 3-day loss >3% and day 4 gains >1%
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter long XLP on day 4 if prior 3-day loss >3% and day 4 gains >1% Exit: Exit after 5 trading days or if price falls 2% from entry
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Yahoo Finance daily prices for XLP via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Staples experience frequent short-term selloffs and rebounds in volatile environments.

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily prices for XLP

schema.behavior: When XLP falls 3%+ in 3 days but bounces back 1%+ on the 4th day, it often signals short-term oversold relief.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer staples often see quick mean reversion after sharp short-term selloffs.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLP on day 4 if prior 3-day loss >3% and day 4 gains >1%
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or if price falls 2% from entry

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Staples experience frequent short-term selloffs and rebounds in volatile environments.
